<a id="kind-governanceinstance"></a>
## GovernanceInstance

Manage OCI Access Governance Control Plane governance instances.

- `Plural`: `governanceinstances`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `accessgovernancecp.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/accessgovernancecp/v1beta1/governanceinstance.md) (`config/samples/accessgovernancecp_v1beta1_governanceinstance.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.
